<!-- from preset-next-15-canonical/eslint-rules/require-form-safe-parse.ts -->
## {{id}} — Validate `FormData` parameters via `.safeParse(...)` (R14)

**Stack:** react-next  
**Check:** ESLint `rules-as-tests/require-form-safe-parse` (preset plugin rule)  
**Why:** Server Actions and form handlers that accept `FormData` are the trust boundary; unvalidated `formData.get('name')` is the most common Server Action footgun. Validate via a Zod schema's `.safeParse(Object.fromEntries(formData))` before reading values.
